title: Chao hoi ngay dau di lam
description: Luyen cach chao, gioi thieu ngan va bat dau cuoc tro chuyen o cong ty.
objectives: Gioi thieu ban than ngan gon
Dung cau mo dau tu nhien o noi lam viec

words.example: Good morning, everyone.
Welcome to the team.
I met my new coworker today.
I am happy to join the team.
My manager introduced me to everyone.
The office is on the third floor.
Let me introduce myself.
Nice to meet you, Anna.
This is my first day at work.
Please let me know if you need help.

sentences.english: Good morning. I am happy to join the team today.
sentences.meaningVi: Chao buoi sang. Hom nay toi rat vui duoc tham gia vao doi.

sentences.english: My name is Linh, and this is my first day.
sentences.meaningVi: Toi ten la Linh, va hom nay la ngay dau tien cua toi.

sentences.english: It is nice to meet you all.
sentences.meaningVi: Rat vui duoc gap moi nguoi.

sentences.english: Please let me know if I can help.
sentences.meaningVi: Hay cho toi biet neu toi co the giup.

sentences.english: I look forward to working with you.
sentences.meaningVi: Toi mong duoc lam viec cung ban.

grammar.title: I am... / My name is...
grammar.explanationVi: Dung I am... hoac My name is... de tu gioi thieu ngan gon va lich su.

grammarTip: Dung I am... hoac My name is... de tu gioi thieu ngan gon va lich su.

quiz.question: Cau nao dung de noi "Rat vui duoc gap ban"?
quiz.explanationVi: Nice to meet you dung khi gap ai do lan dau hoac trong loi chao lich su.

quiz.question: "This is my first day" nghia la gi?
options: Day la ngay nghi cua toi
Day la ngay dau tien cua toi
quiz.correctAnswer: Day la ngay dau tien cua toi
quiz.explanationVi: Cau nay dung de noi hom nay la ngay dau tien.

title: Gioi thieu ten va vai tro
description: Tu gioi thieu ten, vi tri va bo phan khi gap dong nghiep moi.
objectives: Noi ten va vai tro cua minh
Hoi vai tro cua nguoi khac
Phan hoi lich su khi duoc gioi thieu

words.example: My name is Linh.
What is your role on the team?
My position is project assistant.
I work in the sales department.
I am responsible for customer support.
I report to the team manager.
She is my colleague from accounting.
I am working on a new project.
I have a background in marketing.
I have two years of experience.

sentences.english: I work in the operations department.
sentences.meaningVi: Toi lam viec o phong van hanh.

sentences.english: I am responsible for daily reports.
sentences.meaningVi: Toi phu trach bao cao hang ngay.

sentences.english: What is your role on the team?
sentences.meaningVi: Vai tro cua ban trong doi la gi?

sentences.english: I report to the project manager.
sentences.meaningVi: Toi bao cao cho quan ly du an.

sentences.english: I have experience in customer support.
sentences.meaningVi: Toi co kinh nghiem ho tro khach hang.

grammar.title: I work in... / I am responsible for...
grammar.explanationVi: Dung I work in... de noi phong ban va I am responsible for... de noi phan viec minh phu trach.

grammarTip: Dung I work in... de noi phong ban va I am responsible for... de noi phan viec minh phu trach.

quiz.question: "department" nghia la gi?
quiz.explanationVi: department la phong ban trong cong ty.

quiz.question: Cau nao noi ve trach nhiem cong viec?
options: I am responsible for daily reports.
It is nice to meet you.
quiz.correctAnswer: I am responsible for daily reports.
quiz.explanationVi: I am responsible for... dung de noi minh phu trach viec gi.

quiz.question: "What is your role on the team?" dung de hoi gi?
quiz.explanationVi: Cau nay hoi vai tro hoac vi tri cua nguoi khac trong doi.

title: Hoi viec can lam
description: Hoi uu tien cong viec, nhan nhiem vu va xac nhan lai yeu cau.
objectives: Xac nhan nhiem vu duoc giao
Noi se xu ly viec ngay

words.example: Which task should I do first?
What is the top priority today?
The deadline is Friday.
I will handle your request.
Can you confirm the details?
I will check the document.
Please send me the file.
Could you give me an update?
I will do it right away.
I will follow up after lunch.

sentences.english: What should I do first today?
sentences.meaningVi: Hom nay toi nen lam viec gi truoc?

sentences.english: Could you confirm the deadline?
sentences.meaningVi: Ban co the xac nhan han chot khong?

sentences.english: I will check the document right away.
sentences.meaningVi: Toi se kiem tra tai lieu ngay.

sentences.english: Please send me the latest file.
sentences.meaningVi: Vui long gui cho toi file moi nhat.

sentences.english: I will follow up after the meeting.
sentences.meaningVi: Toi se phan hoi tiep sau cuoc hop.

grammar.title: What should I...?
grammar.explanationVi: Dung What should I + dong tu nguyen mau de hoi minh nen lam gi.

grammarTip: Dung What should I + dong tu nguyen mau de hoi minh nen lam gi.

quiz.question: "priority" nghia la gi?
quiz.explanationVi: priority la muc do uu tien.

quiz.question: Cau nao hoi viec nen lam truoc?
options: What should I do first today?
quiz.correctAnswer: What should I do first today?
quiz.explanationVi: What should I do first today? dung de hoi viec can uu tien.

quiz.question: "right away" nghia la gi?
quiz.explanationVi: right away nghia la ngay lap tuc.

title: Trao doi trong cuoc hop
description: Dung cau ngan de hoi y kien, xac nhan thong tin va de xuat trong cuoc hop.

words.example: We have a meeting at 10 a.m.
The agenda has three items.
What is your opinion?
I suggest we start with the report.
I agree with your idea.
Could you clarify this point?
We need to make a decision today.
What is the next step?
I will write the meeting minutes.
Please add this action item.

sentences.english: Could you clarify this point for me?
sentences.meaningVi: Ban co the lam ro diem nay giup toi khong?

sentences.english: I suggest we review the agenda first.
sentences.meaningVi: Toi de xuat chung ta xem chuong trinh hop truoc.

sentences.english: I agree with the next step.
sentences.meaningVi: Toi dong y voi buoc tiep theo.

sentences.english: Who will write the meeting minutes?
sentences.meaningVi: Ai se viet bien ban hop?

sentences.english: Let us confirm the action items.
sentences.meaningVi: Chung ta hay xac nhan cac viec can lam sau hop.

grammar.title: Could you...?
grammar.explanationVi: Dung Could you...? de hoi hoac nho ai do mot cach lich su trong cuoc hop.

grammarTip: Dung Could you...? de hoi hoac nho ai do mot cach lich su trong cuoc hop.

quiz.question: "agenda" nghia la gi?
quiz.explanationVi: agenda la danh sach noi dung can ban trong cuoc hop.

quiz.question: Cau nao dung de nho lam ro?
quiz.explanationVi: Could you clarify this point? la cach hoi lich su khi chua ro.

quiz.question: "action item" la gi?
quiz.explanationVi: action item la viec cu the can xu ly sau cuoc hop.

title: Bao cao tien do va xin ho tro
description: Bao cao viec da lam, neu kho khan va xin ho tro mot cach chuyen nghiep.
objectives: Bao cao tien do ngan gon
Xin ho tro hoac them thoi gian

words.example: Here is my progress for today.
I have completed the first task.
I found an issue in the file.
I need support with this report.
There may be a delay.
The task is almost done.
Could you review this for me?
Thank you for your feedback.
I need more time to finish it.
This blocker is slowing me down.

sentences.english: I have completed the first task.
sentences.meaningVi: Toi da hoan thanh nhiem vu dau tien.

sentences.english: I found an issue and need support.
sentences.meaningVi: Toi tim thay mot van de va can ho tro.

sentences.english: The report is almost done.
sentences.meaningVi: Bao cao gan xong roi.

sentences.english: Could you review this when you have time?
sentences.meaningVi: Ban co the xem lai phan nay khi co thoi gian khong?

sentences.english: I may need more time to finish it.
sentences.meaningVi: Toi co the can them thoi gian de hoan thanh viec nay.

grammar.title: I have completed... / I need...
grammar.explanationVi: Dung I have completed... de bao viec da xong va I need... de neu dieu minh can.
examples: I need support with this issue.

grammarTip: Dung I have completed... de bao viec da xong va I need... de neu dieu minh can.

quiz.question: "completed" nghia la gi?
quiz.explanationVi: completed nghia la da hoan thanh.

quiz.question: Cau nao dung de xin ho tro?
options: I need support with this report.
quiz.correctAnswer: I need support with this report.
quiz.explanationVi: I need support with... dung de noi minh can ho tro o viec nao.

quiz.question: "I may need more time" nghia la gi?
options: Toi co the can them thoi gian
Toi dong y voi y kien do
quiz.correctAnswer: Toi co the can them thoi gian
quiz.explanationVi: Cau nay dung khi bao co the can them thoi gian de hoan thanh.
